勇者パーティを追い出された器用貧乏

data.title: Yuusha Party wo Oidasareta Kiyoubinbou
data.title_japanese: 勇者パーティを追い出された器用貧乏
title_synonyms: Yuusya Party wo Oidasareta Kiyou Bimbou
data.synopsis:
"Orhun Dura, today will be your last day in the party."

Orhun, once a skilled Swordsman, had adapted to the role of Enchanter to fill a crucial gap in the Hero Party. However, one day, the party leader abruptly dismisses him, claiming his skills are lacking. Branded a "weakling" and a "jack of all trades, master of none," by his former comrades, Orhun is cast out without a second thought.

Determined to start anew, he returns to adventuring—this time as a Swordsman, the role he originally excelled in. But his time as an Enchanter was far from wasted. The experience, knowledge, and countless original spells he developed in the Hero Party have forged him into a warrior unlike any other. Now, armed with an unconventional set of skills, Orhun is ready to carve his own path—one that will prove his true strength to the world.

(Source: MAL News)

data.title: Giant Ojousama
data.synopsis:
Oriko Fujidou, the daughter of the powerful Fujidou conglomerate—the world's leading force in vending machine development and distribution—was gifted an entire city by her father at the age of four. Over the past ten years, she has devoted herself to its growth and prosperity.

However, the city's peaceful days come to an abrupt end when an enormous, unidentified invader attacks. In a desperate attempt to fight back, her loyal butler, Dr. Sebastian gives Oriko a newly developed energy drink. The moment she drinks it, her body grows to a towering size, surpassing even skyscrapers. Though struggling at first, she ultimately manages to repel the invader.

But the attacks don't stop. Each time a new threat emerges, Oriko transforms into a giant once more, standing to protect the city she has nurtured with her own hands.

(Source: MAL News)

data.title: Cash
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Cash by NERD CONNECTION.

data.title: As One
data.synopsis:
The movie follows You, a high school student in modern-day Japan who dreams of becoming a musician but struggles with family opposition and conflicts within his band. One day, while walking through Shibuya, he hears a desperate voice calling for help, and a blinding white light engulfs him.

Meanwhile, far across the cosmos, the celestial body Meguriboshi is on the brink of war over the energy source known as "Hoshichi" (Star Blood). Just as a ceasefire is about to be negotiated between the warring nations, a massive orbital debris field descends, threatening disaster. Laco, a young mechanic, rushes to aid the planet's defense force but finds herself in grave danger. As she falls into unconsciousness, her mind connects with You's, marking the beginning of their intertwined fates.

(Source: MAL News)

titles.title: さわらないで小手指くん

data.title: Sawaranaide Kotesashi-kun
data.title_japanese: さわらないで小手指くん
data.synopsis:
Seiwa University High School is renowned for its elite athletes and national-level sports teams. Despite not playing any sports himself, Kouyou Kotesashi enters the school hoping to become a sports doctor and accepts a live-in position as a dormitory's caretaker. Upon his arrival, Kotesashi learns that the dorm is also home to five skilled female athletes: Aroma Kusunoki, Miyuki Hongou, Izumi Sumiyoshi, Chiyo Sayamagaoka, and Aoba Kitahara.

Although faced with skepticism, Kotesashi quickly proves his worth by using his vast knowledge of the human body and massage techniques. With a single touch, he identifies what is troubling each of the girls and helps them recover properly. When the chairman promises him a scholarship if he takes care of the girls' well-being, Kotesashi is determined to ensure that they stay in top shape.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Tamaranai no wa Koi nano ka

title_synonyms: Is It Because of Love That I Can't Resist?
data.synopsis:
Misuzu was branded a delinquent when a small incident left him isolated. But one day, he sees the top student, Kitahara, get surrounded by bullies and decides to help him out. That sparked Kitahara's interest in the lonely boy, but Misuzu pushes Kitahara away. "If you get involved with me, you'll get ostracized by everyone else too." But it won't take long for Misuzu's resolve to falter...

(Source: Kodansha USA)

data.title: Onmyou Kaiten Re:Birth
data.synopsis:
Teenage delinquent Takeru Narihira has been having a recurring dream where he is chased by monsters, only for a mysterious girl to always rescue him. Having fallen in love with her, he promises her on their 1,999th meeting that he will be the one to save her the next time. But a motorcycle accident sends Takeru to Denji Heian-kyo—an alternate version of Japan's ancient capital with futuristic technology and the home of the girl from his dreams, Tsukiyima, who does not recognize him.

However, a black mist soon descends upon the city, petrifying citizens and unleashing monsters called oni. Only the so-called onmyouji—sorcerers who wield mystical powers and pilot magical "shikigami" suits—can fight them. When the mist returns, Takeru discovers that he has strange transformation powers and can resist the oni. But he and Tsukimiya are ultimately killed, and Takeru awakens in Denji Heian-kyo once again, this time two weeks before the appearance of the mist. Swearing to protect Tsukimiya at all costs, Takeru vows to become an onmyouji and change the future.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Onmyou Kaiten Re:Birth aired on Fuji TV's +Ultra block.

A Tale of the Great Saint
The Reincarnated Great Saint Hides That She's a Saint
転生した大聖女は、聖女であることをひた隠す
A Tale of the Secret Saint

data.title: Tensei shita Daiseijo wa, Seijo de Aru Koto wo Hitakakusu
data.title_english: A Tale of the Secret Saint
data.title_japanese: 転生した大聖女は、聖女であることをひた隠す
title_synonyms: A Tale of the Great Saint
The Reincarnated Great Saint Hides That She's a Saint
data.synopsis:
Fia always dreamed of becoming a knight. Born into a family of knights, she's the least talented among them, but she still clutches to her hope and trains with everything she has. When the day comes for her to slay a small demon and prove her worth, she ends up face to face with a dragon instead! A deadly injury makes her life flash before her eyes... and she suddenly remembers her former life, when she was a powerful Saint in a bygone era who defeated the Demon King. That life ended in pain because of who she was, making her fear ever becoming a Saint again. Now that the magic from her previous life has been rekindled, she may become a more powerful knight than she ever dreamed–if only she can survive long enough!

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

data.synopsis:
In the special pre-movie footage released, we see Bullish Katarina, Weak Katarina, Happy Katarina, and Chairman Katarina, who often hold meetings in Katarina's head in the TV series, quickly heading to the movie theater. The girls arrived on time for the screening, grabbed some popcorn, put their cell phones and smartphones on silent mode, and were all set to watch the movie, when a serious Katarina appeared on the screen and said, "Your seats are over here!!" Of course, it was revealed that the meeting will continue to take place in Katarina's head in this movie version as well.

(Source: Official Website)

Tojima Tanzaburo Wants to Be a Masked Rider

data.title: Toujima Tanzaburou wa Kamen Rider ni Naritai

data.title_japanese: 東島丹三郎は仮面ライダーになりたい
title_synonyms: Tojima Tanzaburo Wants to Be a Masked Rider
data.synopsis:
Tanzaburou Toujima has spent his entire life chasing a dream: to become Kamen Rider. Now, at 40, reality has nearly caught up with him, and he's on the verge of letting go of his childhood fantasy.

That is, until he gets caught up in a crime wave led by the "Fake Shocker" gang—turning his long-time dream into something far more dangerous.

What starts as a pretend hero's journey quickly becomes something real. The ultimate Kamen Rider fantasy is about to begin!

(Source: MAL News)
